meaning: n.石灰岩地区常见的地形
examples: The principal karst features are the karst hills, dry valley, the grike and so on.
There are karst caves in Guilin.
Karst landscapes differ because of geology and climate.
Dinosaur-bearing Jurassic and Cretaceous rocks as well as tropical tower karst can be found here.
Karst recommends Greek yogurt with berries, almond or hemp butter with an apple, or a protein shake.
